digest.component_or_area: op-cert merge-gate verification CI lane (mirroring verify-identity)
propositions: Add a required-environment op-cert verification lane that reuses the existing verify-identity merged-log walk and config-driven posture/boundary rather than a parallel walker.

A new rebar verify-opcert CLI reads verify.require_environment and verify.opcert_enforce_since, groups the merged log by ticket, and exits 1 only if an enforced in-scope ticket lacks a valid completion-verifier op-cert.
The enforcement anchor for a ticket lacking an op-cert is the introducing commit of its terminal close STATUS event, checked against opcert_enforce_since for grandfathering.

The verifier trusts only signature-verified envelope contents: it recomputes material_fingerprint from authoritative ticket state and constrains merged_log_commit to be a real ancestor of gated HEAD, ignoring the record's plaintext mirrors.

Era key-validity must be evaluated at the cert's storage anchor S (introducing commit of the SIGNATURE event, fail-closed) using tickets-branch log positions, not the cert's self-chosen merged_log_commit, to close a revoked-key rollback gap.
A revoked key without a grandfather pin fails all its certs, while certs stored at/before a pin remain valid, preserving routine rotation history.
